clips.title: The Crowd
clips.prompt: Cinematic VFX time freeze. Everything stops — a busy crowd is frozen mid-step around a person who alone is the still center. The camera orbits a full 360 degrees around the fixed figure through the frozen crowd, everyone suspended motionless. A person standing calmly. Frozen time, 360 orbit, suspended crowd, 24fps.

clips.title: The Club
clips.prompt: Cinematic VFX time freeze. A packed dance floor freezes completely, dancers caught mid-motion, confetti suspended in the air, while the camera orbits a full circle around a person standing calm and still at the center. A person in stylish clothes. Frozen time, 360 orbit, suspended dancers and confetti, 24fps.

clips.title: The Intersection
clips.prompt: Cinematic VFX time freeze. A busy city intersection freezes — cars, cyclists and pedestrians all suspended mid-motion — while the camera orbits a full 360 degrees around a person standing still at the center of it all. A person in a coat. Frozen time, 360 orbit, suspended traffic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Park
clips.prompt: Cinematic VFX time freeze. A park scene freezes — birds suspended mid-flight, a fountain's water frozen in the air, leaves paused — while the camera orbits a full circle around a person standing calm and still at the center. A person in casual clothes. Frozen time, 360 orbit, suspended birds and water, 24fps.

clips.title: The Splash
clips.prompt: Cinematic VFX time freeze. A moment freezes as a big splash of water erupts and hangs suspended in the air around a person, every droplet motionless, while the camera orbits a full 360 degrees around the still figure. A person in casual clothes. Frozen time, 360 orbit, suspended water splash, 24fps.

clips.title: The Game
clips.prompt: Cinematic VFX time freeze. A sports moment freezes — players and a ball suspended mid-action on the field, dust and spray hanging in the air — while the camera orbits a full circle around a person standing still at the center. A person in athletic wear. Frozen time, 360 orbit, suspended players, 24fps.
